basics.name: Md. Rashed
basics.label: Researcher in AI, Computer Vision & Medical Imaging
basics.summary: Researcher with a B.Sc. in Information and Communication Engineering from PUST. Experienced in deep learning, biomedical image processing, and AI-based systems. Actively involved in research projects and international publications, focusing on medical imaging and intelligent systems.

work.summary: Working on AI and medical imaging research.
highlights: Develop deep learning models for segmentation tasks
